name: pr_wl_transient_exit
drl: rule W when accumulate( E0(tag == "z", $v : v) over window:length(2); $s : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: D-185 spec witness: deferred update entries evaluate against EPOCH-FINAL fields (D-160 'live fields = epoch-final') — a same-epoch exit-and-back transient is INVISIBLE (the member never leaves: 14 folds), while a cross-epoch exit is visible (x3). The model's per-entry field application was corrected to the engine's explicit-active + final-alpha structure. GRADUATED at D-185 (engine==oracle).
